item.title: GENIUS Act stablecoin compliance deadline reaches July 18 as OCC, FDIC, and FinCEN finalize rulebooks
Senate CLARITY Act hearing convenes July 17 to advance SEC-CFTC digital-asset jurisdiction framework
SEC prepares July proposal to exempt certain crypto activities from securities registration requirements
Morgan Stanley receives preliminary OCC approval for digital-asset trust bank covering custody and staking
UK FCA finalizes stablecoin capital requirement at 1% of issuance, below EU MiCA's 2% threshold
Bank of England sets GBP 40 billion cap on systemic sterling stablecoins, drops individual holding limit
US and UK regulators publish joint recommendations to harmonize stablecoin and tokenized-asset rules
EU MiCA transitional period ended July 1 as European Commission opens review of framework updates
Ostium perpetuals protocol loses $18M in oracle-manipulation attack exploiting price-feed automation
JPMorgan begins accepting Bitcoin ETFs as loan collateral following GENIUS Act enactment
US regulators propose bank-equivalent AML identity verification requirements for stablecoin issuers
Dinari and tZERO launch integrated tokenized US equities platform targeting broker-dealers
JPMorgan submits comment warning CLARITY Act timeline risks creating digital-asset market loopholes
Aptos blockchain vulnerability patched after researchers found flaw risking $70B in network assets
JPMorgan raises IBIT stake to 8.3 million shares in Q1 2026 and expands Solana ETF exposure
